name: Whitehaven Beach & Hill Inlet
description: Experience the stunning beauty of the Whitsundays with a visit to Whitehaven Beach and Hill Inlet. This tour offers a perfect blend of adventure and relaxation, ideal for nature lovers and photographers seeking breathtaking views. Enjoy crystal-clear waters, pristine beaches, and the iconic swirling sands of Hill Inlet. Perfect for families, couples, and solo travelers looking to explore one of Australia's most picturesque locations.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina Meeting Point C
includes:
Snorkeling or scuba diving in pristine reefs
Visit to Whitehaven Beach
Guided tour of Hill Inlet
highlights:
Explore the iconic Whitehaven Beach
Witness the swirling sands of Hill Inlet
Snorkel or scuba dive in the Great Barrier Reef
Perfect for nature lovers and photographers
Ideal for families, couples, and solo travelers
price_tiers: Private Double with Shared Bathroom (for 2 people): A$1980 Total | Private Double Cabin with Ensuite (for 2 people): A$2150 Total

name: Private Double Cabin with Shared Bath
description: Embark on a luxurious journey through the Whitsundays with a stay in a Private Double Cabin. This experience offers an intimate and comfortable escape, perfect for couples seeking a romantic getaway. Enjoy the stunning scenery of the Great Barrier Reef and indulge in the serene beauty of the Whitsunday Islands. This tour is ideal for those looking to relax in style while exploring one of Australia's most iconic destinations.

name: Whitsunday Skipper 2D1N | Mainstay Sailing
description: Embark on the adventure of a lifetime with Mainstay Sailing's 2-day, 1-night journey through the Whitsunday Islands. This tour offers a unique opportunity for hands-on sailing, guided by an experienced crew. You'll visit iconic destinations such as Whitehaven Beach and snorkel in the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park. Ideal for adventurers and sailing enthusiasts, this tour combines the thrill of sailing with the breathtaking beauty of the Whitsundays.
includes:
All activities (sailing, snorkelling, bush walks, beach trips)
Experienced crew
Meals and snacks
Coffee, tea and drinking water
Certificate of participation
Bed linen
Marine Park fees and taxes
highlights:
Authentic sailing adventure on board a monohull
Small group tour with only 6 people maximum
Experienced crew
Tea, coffee, and drinking water provided
All meals and snacks included
Option to BYO alcoholic drinks
Snorkel in the Great Barrier Reef Marine Park
Personalised guidance
Spacious vessel
Visit Whitehaven Beach
